title: Silent Passage
subtitle: Evasion Training Exercise
blue_mission_summary: BLUE submarine must reach the escape waypoint undetected, or survive until timeout if detected.
objective: Transit through hostile waters to the extraction point while avoiding detection by enemy ASW forces.

briefing.situation: Three RED destroyers are conducting aggressive anti-submarine warfare exercises in sector KILO-7. Intelligence reports they are operating with full active sonar capability and practicing coordinated search patterns. Each destroyer carries a full complement of depth charges and anti-submarine torpedoes.
briefing.mission: Transit through the patrol zone and reach the extraction waypoint at grid reference (4000, -2000). Priority is survival - avoid detection if possible, evade and survive if detected.
briefing.execution: A strong thermocline layer exists at 75 meters depth. Recommend using this layer for acoustic masking during transit. Maintain ultra-quiet status: no active sonar emissions, minimize speed changes, avoid cavitation at all costs. The destroyers are spaced approximately 3-5km apart - look for gaps in their search pattern.
briefing.threats: Each destroyer carries 30+ depth charges and 10 torpedoes. If they achieve contact, expect depth charge patterns of 5-8 charges per run with 50m spread. They will attempt to box you in using coordinated movements. Do not underestimate their persistence.
briefing.notes: This is a training exercise. Weapons release is authorized for self-defense only. The thermocline is your friend - use it wisely. Good hunting, Captain.

RED.narrative: Three destroyers conducting an aggressive ASW patrol of sector KILO-7. Standing orders are to detect, prosecute, and destroy any submarine attempting to transit the patrol zone. Active sonar authorized; coordinate via 3-5 km spacing to deny escape vectors.
RED.primary_objective: Detect and destroy the submarine before it reaches the extraction waypoint at [4000, -2000]
RED.intelligence: Submarine known to be operating in this sector. A strong thermocline at 75 m may be exploited for acoustic masking — search both above and below the layer.
constraints: Maintain 3-5 km spacing between destroyers to maximize coverage
Box the submarine using coordinated maneuvers

blue_captain_summary: Three RED destroyers are patrolling the sector. Proceed to the escape waypoint while minimizing detectability. Expect depth-charge attacks if counter-detected.

ship_behaviors.red-dd-01: You are a destroyer aggressively hunting enemy submarines. CONSTANTLY use active sonar (active_ping tool) to search for contacts every 15-20 seconds. When you detect ANY submarine contact, immediately plot an intercept course and close at maximum speed (25+ knots). Track the contact's movement and predict its position. Drop depth charges in spread patterns when within 2 km of the predicted contact position. Use 5-8 charges per drop with 50m spread. Coordinate with other destroyers to maintain 3-5 km spacing and box in the submarine. Your mission is to destroy the submarine before it reaches the escape waypoint at (4000, -2000).

triggers.comms: INFO: RED destroyers increasing speed; possible search pattern shift.
